title: Spicy Korean Pork Jjigae
description: A spicy, smoky Korean-inspired dish made with rich pork and a variety of flavors, suitable for a low-carb keto diet.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ground pork and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic, Korean chili flakes, smoked paprika, and fish sauce. Cook for 1 minute.
Stir in gochujang sauce and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, stirring occasionally, until the sauce thickens and the pork is cooked through, about 10 minutes.
Garnish with chopped green onions and serve hot.
Serve with a side of kimchi or a salad for a complete keto meal.
